entry.title: SAP Code-Jam Request in New York
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We would like to request a SAP Code Jam request at Bloomberg, New York Location. We will have around 30-35 attendees participating. We would like to keep this inclusive for our Bloomberg Team. We are interested in the following topics: Hands-on with BTP CLI and APIs, Generative AI, Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA and Python. We are inclined to have this hosted in the last quarter of 2024. We can mutually decide the date based on the availability of your team members and ours. Looking forward to hearing from you soon.

Thanks,
Pallavi

entry.title: Re: SAP BODS - Data exporting in incorrect order (.csv file)
entry.content: Ok thanks for your help

entry.title: SAP Datasphere Top Features in May 2024
entry.content:
1. Multi-lingual metadata support
  2. Efficiency Features:
    • Analytic Model
    • Data Access Control
    • Task Chain
    • Data Product

entry.title: Re: FM to obtain the SAP user's field value authorization...
entry.content: Look at a (released) FM such as SUSR_USER_AUTH_FOR_OBJ_GET.

entry.title: Re: Accrual movement type on gl accounts
entry.content:
Hi Roscho,

I would review the following Scope Items in detail to see if the functionality included would support your customer’s requirement:

  • Purchase Order Accruals (2VB)
  • Service Entry Sheet Based Accruals (63L) 

 

I’m adding the links to the US 2402 version (current as of May 2024). Please remember to update to the latest version (if there is one available) and your country.

 

In addition to the evaluation of those scope items I strongly suggest to evaluate the scope item Project Control – Capital Projects (35F) The processes included in this scope item help our customers to manage Capital Projects, including the link to the Purchase Order processing and settlement into Assets Under Construction (AuC) and Final Assets. 

 

I hope this helps

 

Ernesto Cepeda

I'm looking for an option similar to position, you can access it through Data Manage or Manage Positions, I'm wondering if I can configure my new MDF, with its own manage data, so I wouldn't have access to other MDF objects.

entry.title: Re: Excel formula to SQL formula for query
entry.content: Doesn't (recent versions of) Abap SQL handle a CEIL( sql_exp ) function?

entry.title: MD04 Rescheduling and Availability check
entry.content:
Hi,

The case is following. In MD04 I have Sales order and Purchasing order.

1. Sales order - date is 01.05.2024

Purchasing order - date is 31.08.204. But Rescheduling date is 01.05.2024 (exception 10).

It is clear, since system reschedule Purchase order to cover requirement of Sales order.

2. ATP check (CO09) for Sales order shows availability date 01.05.2024 (based on rescheduling date). 

The problem is that I still need availability date 31.08.2024 (NOT rescheduling date).

>>> So I need to de-activate rescheduling function for the Material. Therefore, in OMDW I have created new Material Group with Rescheduling horizont = 0. Both Tolerance are also = 0. Then I assigned Material group to Material Master. But it does not help, because rescheduling still happens, even for new orders.

Are there any configurations which could help? I do not touch OPPQ for Plant since consider, that MRP Group has higher priority.

entry.title: Display absence quotas in ESS by creating time-type to combine several quotas in one line
entry.content:
Hi All,

In my company we have several absence quota types in our SAP PT as below:

  1. Vacation Quota
  2. Saved Vacation Quota-1
  3. Saved Vacation Quota-2
  4. Saved Vacation Quota-3
  5. Saved Vacation Quota-4
  6. Saved Vacation Quota-6

I need to display absence quotas in ESS, but we are facing an issue of how can we display the quota #1 in one line and combine the other quotas to be displayed in ESS in one other line noting that the line of combined quotas should display the summation of quotas’ days.

Can you please guide me how can we can create the time type and steps to combine the above mentioned quotas to be displayed

Thank you!

entry.title: Error while subscribing to 'Space' service in BTP trial account
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

 

I am trying to create space in my BTP trial account. When I hit on 'Save' button, I get the following error:

"We could not save your changes. You've entered an invalid value for the quota amount. This can happen if you are trying to increase the quota when it has already been reached, or you are trying to remove quota that is currently in use. Make sure the quota you want to add or remove is available or no longer in use, and then try again."

Dear Vera,

However, there is no problem to access the port on OS level:

Please explain

entry.title: Re: RAP: How to access child information while being on p...
entry.content:
Thanks for your answer Andre!

The reason why I would not like to use the Draft feature is because I do not want to persist the buffer data nor to have the need of creating an additional DB table.

My buffer class is written on the same class where I have my behavior implementation and it just has a table with the 3 fields I need (ID of parent, a flag for marking that certain child is needed and another flag for confirming that the child is present). I append an entry when creating the father and mark the second flag upon the creation of the child. Finally, I check on the check_before_save that for each registry on the buffer table, both flags are marked, if not, raise an error and do not save.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics cloud: table filters disappear when removing/moving a page
entry.content: Please report this to SAP if you can, thanks!

entry.title: Re: Calculating Working days between 2 dates SAP SAC
entry.content:
So you want to calculate working days and exclude week-end.

  • How are defined your available factory calendar(s)
  • Look at Fm such as HR_99S_INTERVAL_BETWEEN_DATES, DATE_CHECK_WORKINGDAY, HOLIDAY_GET or DAY_ATTRIBUTES_GET

We need one help on adding Korean language in SAP MII. Currently Korean language not showing in MII  15.1 portal. How to add / enable it and also how to add it in bundle properties creation?

Thanks,

Senthil

entry.title: Re: SAP Developer News, May 30th, 2024
entry.content:
Hi @qmacro very informative post thanks for sharing…

Thanks-

entry.title: Can a custom event trigger a process in SAP Build Process Automation?
entry.content:
TLDR; No. Only predefined events can trigger a process in SAP Build Process Automation.

My last interactions with SAP Build Process Automation revolve around how you can trigger process by using events. We know that when configuring a process, one of the triggers can be set to start it is an event - Create an event to start a process. At the moment, the UI only lets you select the events from a dropdown. This is limited to some predefined business events.

By looking under the hood (Web browser, developer tools) I noticed that when setting an event trigger, there is an HTTP request made to the API. This request contains a payload with the following structure:

{
    "name": "MyCustomEventName",
    "identifier": "mycustomeventname",
    "description": "",
    "header": {
        "triggerableArtifactUids": [
            "$.436i6204-0818-3t8o-q0if-h55t46k016gh"
        ],
        "sourceArtifactUid": "sap.s4.beh.businesspartner.v1.BusinessPartner.Created.v1"
    }
}

The sourceArtifactUid field is set to sap.s4.beh.businesspartner.v1.BusinessPartner.Created.v1. This is the event that triggers the process. I've seen this value before when dealing with the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Business Partner events.... this is the value set in the type field of the event payload. Remember that SAP has embraced the CloudEvents specification and the type field will be included in the header (context) part of the event message. This got me wondering, what would happen if I set a different value in the sourceArtifactUid field in the request? Will it accept it as a trigger? Let's try it.

{
    "name": "MyCustomEventName",
    "identifier": "mycustomeventname",
    "description": "",
    "header": {
        "triggerableArtifactUids": [
            "$.436i6204-0818-3t8o-q0if-h55t46k016gh"
        ],
        "sourceArtifactUid": "my.custom.event.v1"
    }
}

Will it work? Unfortunately, no. The service validates the value set as sourceArtifactUid. If it doesn't match any of the predefined values, it will not accept it. This is a good thing, as it prevents you from setting a trigger that doesn't exist. That said, it would be nice to have the ability to handle custom events that can trigger processes. I imagine that the custom event will need to follow the CloudEvents specification, but that wouldn't be a big problem. It will be great to have this type of functionality as it would allow for more flexibility and automation in the platform, e.g. events from custom applications.

First published at: https://ajmaradiaga.com/Custom-event-trigger-SBPA/

entry.title: Re: Get Limited Screen While Scanning Bar Code
entry.content: You can use the OnValueChange event on the simple property form cell to get the value and adjust as needed.

entry.title: How to make a request for DB recovery in SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content:
If we need a SAP HANA Cloud DB recovery, we would like to know what is the procedure required to request recovery.
I'm inquiring about the work plan to be done in case of a recovery situation

1. Contact Point ( Only Incident? )
2. How to make a request for DB recovery.
3. It's usually an emergency, but how fast is it handled?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to make a request for DB recovery in SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

If no Datalake is attached, recovery can be done via SAP HANA Cloud Central:

Managing SAP HANA Database Instances | SAP Help Portal

It’s available for all HANA versions. Please note that multi-environment tools has to be enabled (3303080 - How to enable Multi-Environment SAP HANA Cloud Tools (HANA Cloud Central) - SAP for Me).

This is explained in KBA:

3466792 - Recovery of SAP HANA Cloud Instance request to SAP Technical Support - SAP for Me

See also:

  • SAP HANA Cloud Administration Guide for more information about Backups and Recovery.
  • 3280211 - How to recovery HANA Cloud instance? - SAP for Me

Best Regards,

Technical Support

entry.title: Enhancing Quote-to-Order for E2E Lot Size-of-One E2E scenario
entry.content:
In the past release, the user story of Lot Size-of-One (Make-to-Order) End-to-End scenario started with direct Sales Order creation, while dealing with Configurable Material. To strengthen the Quote-to-Order business process for the Make-to-Order scenario with Configurable Material (AVC), there has been an extension to the story line by starting from Inquiry, Quotation and Sales Order creation in reference to the Quotation number generated. 

As Sales representative, when a customer enquires about a product with customizing request, the Make-to-Order scenario can start with Inquiry initiation via Manage Sales Inquiries Fiori app.

Inquiry creation

Material and customizing

Inquiry created

Now as the Inquiry is generated. Based on this Sales Representative can proceed to create Quotation using Fiori app Manage Sales Quotations

Creation of QuotationReview Availability Check Result confirming on timelines and quantity

Quotation is generation

The Sales Representative has Inquiry and Quotation created. The next step is creation of Sales Order via VA01. The Sales Order can be created with reference to the Quotation number, which reduces the effort of re-entering the material customizing and cost calculations.

Sales Order created with reference

With the above steps Quote-to-Order process is complete. Next, the MRP runs can be scheduled to evaluate the material deficit and Purchase Requisitions can be generated accordingly.

Please refer to SCN Blog - Working with E2E Lot Size of One (CTO scenario) wi... - SAP Community to complete the Order-to-Cash process flow.

entry.title: Re: CRUD with MDF without using Manage Data
entry.content: Try exploring the option to control the access to the Objects via RBP. So with this you should be able to restrict the objects that you see and not the other objects.

entry.title: Re: Availability check Stock in delivery from STO
entry.content:
Hello @VictorPatricio 

That can be achieved with a custom enhancement in VL01*. See the note 198137 - VL10: User exits / customer-specific enhancements for details.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

However, you can register for SAP Sapphire Virtual in 2024 | SAP Events and watch 3 top Planning sessions from Orlando: SCM106 - IBP roadmap, SCM137 - discussion with customer Organon on SAP IBP & Business AI, SCM166 - discussion with Google on Business AI.

entry.title: MRP Area Level Planning
entry.content:
Hi,

We would like to use the make-to-order production or engineer-to-order planning strategies in MRP areas.
How it would be possible? 

Thank you!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: MRP Area Level Planning
entry.content:
The MTO and ETO strategies can be used only in the plant MRP area and individual customer segments cannot be planned in the MRP area.

See further details in KBA 3476164 - Plant MRP Area Level Planning

Is there a segment with these fields or do we need to extend the segment to include them? or is there any qualifier which we can set in any segments ?  or is there any exit or BAdi available to populate this field( NEWBK).

Thanks in Advance

entry.title: Incorrect value in the Report Earned Profit Overview for KPI
entry.content:
The Report Earned Profit Overview for KPI (FINPRFU30_Q0003) shows sales order from the year previous year though the Accounting Period/Year is entered as 'Year to Date' in the data selection field.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Incorrect value in the Report Earned Profit Overview...
entry.content:
The associated Invoice is completed in the current fiscal year. Additionally, the status of the Sales Order from the previous year was changed from 'In Process' to 'Finished' in the current year. You can verify this in the changes tab of the sales order document.

Therefore, the report includes this sales order from the previous year even though the Accounting Period/Year is entered as 'Year to Date' in the Data Selection field because it has accounting entries in the current fiscal year.

entry.title: Re: MRP Area Level Planning
entry.content: The answer and the KBA are not completely correct. According to question 3 of SAP note 550844, "As of SAP Enhancement Package 3 for SAP ERP 6.0, you can use the business function OPS_PS_CI_1 in the project system to achieve a work breakdown structure (WBS) account assignment on MRP area level."

entry.title: Re: LSMW migration with IDOC method and using IDOC as source Part2: Import
entry.content: Hello I tried to create LSMW using Message Type W_WGRP seems not working for me. Throwing error like Syntax mismatch.

entry.title: Re: MD04 Rescheduling and Availability check
entry.content:
Hello

You are mixing up two different features.
The rescheduling check is used by MRP and the MRP related transaction (such as MD04).
The availability check is something completely different than MRP, and it does not consider the rescheduling check settings.

Regards,
Caetano

entry.title: Benefits Open Enrollment "Edit" action goes to the workflow directly without reaching the cart
entry.content:
While configuring the Open Enrollment for Global benefits, the New enrollment selections are being added to the cart without any issues.

However, for those benefits which are being carried over, the "Edit" transaction doesn't let you add the changes to the cart but instead trigger a workflow directly. Is there a way to make it add to the cart and tie it to a cart workflow?

Please try again" as the screenshot shows (ofc I changed the mail address before taking the screenshot).

I also tried to log into the cloud foundry environment using cf CLI with the same result.

Does anybody is facing a similar issue?

Thank you very much for your help

entry.title: Re-imagining Innovation - Begin of SIT – ICOE AI hackathon – 2024
entry.content:
“Dream, Code, Achieve”

The recent AI Hackathon event was a remarkable success, marking a significant milestone in our ongoing efforts to foster technological innovation and collaboration. The event brought together talented students, industry experts, and academic leaders, creating a vibrant atmosphere of learning, creativity, and future-forward thinking.

Event & Certification Partners:

  • International Center of Excellence for Data Science, AI, and Futuristic Technologies
  • SAP Insider Track Community Kolkata
  • Alien Brains Educations
  • Westernacher Consulting
  • Galelio AG 

Who participated?

All the engineering college students in West Bengal, All the Students from Colleges and Universities in Science and Commerce and relevant departments were eligible for the AI hackathon event. This hackathon was conducted in 2 Rounds.

Hackathon Timeline

11th April 2024: Round 1 (240 marks MCQ-based online exam)

12th April 2024: Round 1 Result Declaration (Top 25 teams advance to Round 2)

12th - 22nd April 2024: Round 2 (10-day Coding problem statement)

22nd April 2024: Final Submission Date of Round 2

25th April 2024: Announcement of Top 10 Teams

27th April 2024: SIT Community Event and Felicitation of Top 10 Teams

Core Team and Mentors

We are proud to have a distinguished panel of mentors and core team members guiding this event:

Prof. Amlan Chakrabarti: COO, International Center of Excellence for Data Science, AI & Futuristic Technologies

Dr. Anindita Ganguly: Member, International Center of Excellence for Data Science, AI & Futuristic Technologies

Dr. Saptarsi Goswami: Member, International Center of Excellence for Data Science, AI & Futuristic Technologies

Sabyasachi Mukhopadhyay: Research Scholar (IIT KGP), Faculty, Google Developer Expert (ML)

Praveen Kumar Bahety: Founder, MD, Alien Brains, Sociana

Srini Gottimukkula: SIT VIP Panelist

Dipankar Saha: SAP Author & Mentor

 

Problem Statement

Theme:   Application of AI in Education

Topic 1:  AI for automated Essay Grading

  • Expectation is to find public datasets, with essays from students and grades by teachers.  
  • Build a model which takes the essay as an input assigns a score ( Free to use different open source models and fine tune)
  • More credit will be given which will explain the reason behind the score

Ref:

kaggle.com/competitions/asap-aes 

github.com/sankalpjain99/Automatic-Essay-Scoring 

frontiersin.org/articles/10.3389/feduc.2020.572367/full 

 

Topic 2:  Bengali to English Translation for Science Subjects

  • Expectation is to find, build datasets with English to Bengali Translation
  • Build or leverage models (Free to explore openAI,  Bhasini etc.) for translation

Ref:

https://ieee-dataport.org/open-access/supara-benchmark-benchmark-dataset-english-bangla-machine-translation 

https://huggingface.co/saiful9379/Bangla-to-English-Translation 

 

Topic 3:  Student Performance Analysis

  • Expectation is to find public datasets with student performance
  • Correlate performance in different disciplines
  • Correlate student background with performance

Ref:

archive.ics.uci.edu/dataset/320/student+performance 

https://datacatalog.worldbank.org/search/dataset/0038947/Learning-Poverty-Global-Database--Historical-data-and-sub-components 

Deliverable:

  • Working prototype in any environment like Google-colab
  • Presentation Explaining the same
  • Writeup should include future implementation plan with roadmap

A slot of 20 minutes will be given between 23rd to 25th April for the presentation of the same

30 marks on Demonstration 10 marks on presentation and 10 marks on Writeup

 

The Top 10

 

Sayandip Bhattacharyya

Generative Solutions

Crypto Coders

Cuber Savants

Zeus

Techie

Algorithm Architects

Web Homie

CamCoderr

Tech Strivers

Continued Support for Top Teams

In alignment with the advice of Dr. Anindita Ganguly, Alien Brains has decided to provide free guidance sessions to the Top 10 teams. This initiative aims to help these teams enhance their current projects significantly. Furthermore, once the ICOE campus is complete, these top-performing teams may receive an invitation for a special guidance session with ICOE professors, providing them with invaluable insights and mentorship.

Celebrating Success and Collaboration

Thanks to everyone involved for their opportunity and support throughout this journey. The event was a resounding success, with all participating students expressing their happiness and enthusiasm. We are pleased to announce that they have received their well-deserved certificates, symbolizing their hard work and dedication. It was a great experience for me to mentor and have experienced real time hackathon and looking forward to many more in Collab with @DataTherapist and other AI enthusiastic in the community.

entry.title: Re: ONB processes are not archived
entry.content: Hi , How are you trying to cancel, archive the processes you don't need, we are trying to do the same to some ones which are redundant but need to know how to remove the from the page

entry.title: How to create new business user in S/4HANA Cloud?
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to create a new business user in my S/4HANA Cloud system.

I click the tile for Create New Business User and click "New" and there's no option to add someone.

 

Kind regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to create new business user in S/4HANA Cloud?
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

In order to create Business Users, you first have to create Workers/Employees using the Manage Workforce app.

You can follow the steps below:

  1. Open the Manage Workforce app.
  2. Choose Create and fill in at least all mandatory fields (Last Name, Worker ID, Email).
    By default, Employee is selected as the Worker Type. This means a business partner in the role of an Employee (BUP003) is created. 
  3. Choose Create. An additional worker is create.
  4. Choose Maintain Business User.
    The Maintain Business Users app is opened. A business user is automatically created with the employee data that you've just entered. 
  5. In the User Data section, enter a User Name.
  6. (Optional) Enter additional User Data or change the Regional Settings.
  7. Choose Save.

To import more than one worker at a time, you can mass import worker data using a spreadsheet. For more information, refer to How to Mass Import Worker Data.

 

For more information, kindly check the following documentations:

  • SAP Help Portal | How to Maintain Business Users
  • SAP Help Portal | Manage Workforce
  • SAP Help Portal | Creating Business Users and Business Roles
  • 3268287 - No employees available to choose while creating a Business User

Kind regards.

entry.title: Re: What’s New in SAP Analytics Cloud Q2 2024
entry.content: Anyone suffering from significant performance issues on both stories and excel templates post-upgrade?

entry.title: Re: Welcome
entry.content:
Hi @rajuverma - I'd like to share some useful links with you that might help you on your path. Glad to have you joining SAP Community!

  • How to Prepare for SAP Certification in our Career Corner
  • SAP Learning
  • Welcome to the beginner corner!

entry.title: Re: MD04 Rescheduling and Availability check
entry.content: If you maintain a rescheduling horizon of 0 in the MRP Group, then the value is taken from the plant. See KBA 3405550.

entry.title: Re: MD04 Rescheduling and Availability check
entry.content: You can use BAdIs MD_MRP_PARAMETERS (classic MRP) or PPH_MRP_NETTING_BADI (MRP Live) to influence the MRP parameters

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Welcome @camillaakkyn2 - thanks for joining SAP Community. You can learn a lot here and share your own experiences also. Some useful links for you:

  • Products and Technology boards
  • Topic pages (get to know about SAP products)
  • Blog posts (read what other community members have to say)
  • Discussion groups (discuss, connect, share)
  • SAP Managed Tags (subscribe to your topic areas of interest)

entry.title: Re: Mass Purchase Requisition deletion using transaction - MASS by adding deletion indicator field
entry.content:
Jose Antony:

It works perfecttly .

entry.title: Re: Z-tcode creation for CJ8G
entry.content:
Hi, 

Thanks for your reply . In PS module, first we need to create transaction variant for t-code CJ8G and then ABAP team create Z-t-code . Now the issue is that I have created transaction variant & ABAP team has created Z-tcode but when I am running Z-tcode , the variant is not getting defaulted . I have around 50 company code . Client requirement is to run t-code CJ8G for project settlement for multiple company code at one go . It is very time consuming to run CJ8G t-code  for one by one company code . So, need to create variant for region wise company code .  (Say one variant for 10 company code )  . 

How can I address this issue ? Please throw some light on this .

Best Regards 

Mohammed

entry.title: Re: MD04 Rescheduling and Availability check
entry.content: Perfect! Thanks Caetano. I mainted Horizon as 1 day, so no rescheduling happens now.

entry.title: Understanding Deep Learning, Neural Network, Activate function, Gradient Decent function and LR
entry.content:
In this blog I am going to discuss about the basic understanding Deep Learning, Neural Network, Activate function, Gradient Decent function and LR.

In ML is a subset of AI where using predefined Algorithm we train the data and base on the training we predict or forecast the result.

Deep learning use the multi layered Neurons  which buid called deep neural networks and  simulate the  the human brain to solve complex decision making and prediction.  Artificial Neuron follows the below mathematical model -

 

Where f(x) is the Activation function. Activation function is used to activate the neurons t by calculating the weighted sum and further adding bias to it. It is used to bring non-linearity in the model. It is used in each layer after each neuron to activate it.

Loss Function : Loss functions are the functions that calculate Loss  (Error) on the outcomes by comparing  it with the target value using function like Mean Squire Error. It calculates the difference between the network's prediction and the actual Target. The main objective is to minimize this loss. Examples  : Mean Squared Error (MSE).

Optimizer : Optimization function used to optimize the Weight and Bias which we get from Loss Functions by minimizing the error E(X)  or loss function using optimum resource and critical path. Example : Adams.

Learning rate and Gradient decent : 

The learning rate is a hyper-parameter used to control the weight and bias correction rate at which an algorithm updates or learns the values of a parameter estimate.  Learning rate denoted by the symbol α.

Gradient Decent : 

Optimization algorithm Gradient descent (GD) is an iterative optimization algorithm, which is used to find a minimum or maximum of a given function. It is used to minimize a loss function. Gradient Descent Algorithm iteratively calculates the next point using gradient at the current position. It subtracts the value because we want to minimize the function and the process can be defined by below -

 

 

 

 

 

I am attaching a simple Neural Network creation in python using Keras which will explain all the above function and flow i.e. how flows are defined.

 

#@title Define neural network parameters
in_neurons = datain_tr_calibrated.shape[1]
ou_neurons = dataou_tr_calibrated.shape[1]

# 100 is the First layer Nuron Count which contain bout input and 1 st hidden layer
# 50 is the 2nd hidden layer Nurom count
# 25 is the 3rd hidden layer Nuron Count

hn_neurons = [100,50,25]


# We used 3 relu function to covern the hidden layer from liner to non linear mode as all the data is not linear.
# The ReLU activation function is used to introduce nonlinearity in a neural network, helping mitigate the vanishing 
# gradient problem during machine learning model training and enabling neural networks to learn more complex
# relationships in data. 

ac_fun     = ['relu', 'relu', 'relu', 'linear']

#We used  loss function Mean Squared Error.

ls_fun     = 'mean_squared_error'

# We used adam OPtimization function to optimize the loss funtion
op_val     = 'adam'

# Total no of itteration of training (back propagation) will be 99 of 16 batch size of data 
it_val     = 99
bt_size    = 16

sh_val     = False # shuffle
vr_val     = 1    # learning to be printed


#@title Construct the neural network

net        = tf.keras.models.Sequential() # back-to-back layers of neurons (platform)

net.add( tf.keras.layers.Dense(units=hn_neurons[0], activation=ac_fun[0], input_dim = in_neurons) ) # input layer and the 1st hidden layer
net.add( tf.keras.layers.Dense(units=hn_neurons[1], activation=ac_fun[1]) )                         # 2nd hidden layer
net.add( tf.keras.layers.Dense(units=hn_neurons[2], activation=ac_fun[2]) )                         # 3rd hidden layer
net.add( tf.keras.layers.Dense(units=ou_neurons   , activation=ac_fun[3]) )                         # output layer

# In the below line all the function has been defined to attached.

net.compile(optimizer = op_val, loss = ls_fun) # compile the network


#@title Network summary
net.summary()


#@title Train the network - Learn the network using optinization function via back propagation -
history = net.fit(datain_tr_calibrated,
                  dataou_tr_calibrated,
                  epochs     = it_val ,
                  batch_size = bt_size, 
                  verbose    = vr_val ,
                  shuffle    = sh_val)


#@title Estimate outputs of testing data : 
dataes_te_calibrated = net.predict(datain_te_calibrated)


# uncalibrate and compare the data with original data by export to excel

predicted_target =  dataes_te_calibrated.flatten()
actual_target = np.array(dataou_te_calibrated).flatten()

 

In my next blog I am going to discuss about the different kind of activation function and where we will use it.

entry.title: Re: The Power Duo: SAP HANA Cloud and SAP Datasphere Enabling IDA & Gen-AI Driven Solutions
entry.content:
HI Philipp,

Thanks for your question.

It is a possibility to leverage the SAP HANA Cloud vector engine via the HANA Coud instance under SAP Datasphere. But it would support only minor workloads and we highly recommened to use stand alone SAP HANA Cloud instance for the flexibility on memory consumptions / CPU usage. Please refer to the SAP Note - 3463689 for more details.

Regards,

Shabana

entry.title: Disable web service navigator
entry.content:
Hello,

As part of Vulnerability scan for our systems, we would like to disable the Web Services Navigator service in the ABAP systems. Kindly let us know how to do the steps to disable the same. 

Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Frozen Automations | Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi @JulB ,

I suggest to divide the extensive change requirements into smaller, manageable updates and release+deploy them incrementally rather than opting for a ‘big bang’ approach.

This ensures one does not risk losing all the hard work in the event of errors as above. Also reverting back to previous versions is easier in case testing/go-live fails.

Regards,
Vishal Rathi

entry.title: Re: Disable web service navigator
entry.content:
Hello,

Please follow the below steps:

  1. Open transaction SOAMANAGER
  2. Switch to the "Technical Administration" tab
  3. Select "SAP Client Settings"
  4. Expand the "Web Services Navigator" section
  5. Click on the "Delete" button under "Java Server Access Information to connect to the Web Services Navigator"

 

Best regards.

entry.title: Re: SAP ME AREA FIORI
entry.content: this is in BAS

Can we expect any certification exam on Datasphere by end of 2024 third Quarter

 

Thanks,

Shyamala

entry.title: Re: New Site Experience with Spaces and Pages is available for SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition
entry.content:
Hi Vera,

Is there a possibility now or in the future to control pages using roles in the standard edition or in the advanced edition?. I believe currently we can only control spaces using roles, in the standard edition. 

For instance, in FI, we have Accounts Receivable (AR) and Accounts Payable (AP). I can create seperate spaces and pages one for FI-AR and the other for FI-AP and assign them to seperate roles. However, I want to create one space Finance and create 2 pages under that for AR and AP and then assign AR page to AR team role and AP page to AP team role.

 

Julius

entry.title: Re: Need to send E-Mail for the same partner.
entry.content:
Thanks for your response;

1. The output is from shipment doc.

2. We have considered your proposed solution, we just wanted to check if going for individual E-mails was possible; I have marked yours as answer to this query.

entry.title: Re: i have to change abap/shared_objects_size_MB to a bigger value
entry.content:
Hi Maximo,

 As mentioned the steps are correct, select the instance profile not on default profile. before change the parameters please read the SAP note 2085980 and based on your SAP and kernel release.

Regards

SS

entry.title: SAP Mentor Interview with Chief Marketing Officer for Cloud ERP
entry.content:
Earlier this month I had the opportunity to interview Eric van Rossum, SAP’s Chief Marketing Officer for Cloud ERP. You can watch the video of our discussion and read the highlights below, where you’ll also find related learning materials. Enjoy!

Eric van Rossum is the Chief Marketing Officer for Cloud ERP at SAP, overseeing product marketing for the company's cloud ERP portfolio. He serves as the strategic bridge between product development and customer acquisition, ensuring product messaging and positioning are attuned to customer needs, and facilitating the successful launch and adoption of products in the market. Eric has been with SAP for 24 years and brings a wealth of experience across various functions including consulting, sales, corporate strategy, and support.

To help me summarize the content of the interview, I've used SAP Generative AI Hub :-). Check here what it ays are the highlights of our conversation: 

  • SAP has two cloud ERP offerings: RISE with SAP and GROW with SAP
  • RISE with SAP is targeted toward SAP’s installed-base customers, providing them a path to cloud ERP at their pace.
  • GROW with SAP is targeted toward net new customers to SAP, and installed base customers who want to take a greenfield approach to cloud ERP.
  • SAP is focusing on making ERP an enabler for business model changes, driving sustainability, and improving efficiency, as these are the key customer needs currently in the market.
  • With RISE and GROW, customers should be able to update their software regularly, making them innovation-ready and efficient, especially with the increasing prevalence of AI.
  • Eric believes the shift to the cloud also requires a paradigm shift within companies, citing an example of a customer who moved towards a standardized system and adopted SAP's out-of-the-box solutions.
  • One of the significant hurdles for customers adopting cloud ERP is the organizational readiness to standardize their processes, which requires a significant cultural shift.
  • Moving ERP to the cloud is seen as risky by some companies due to the critical role ERP systems play in company operations. They need strategies to transition without disrupting their business.
  • Eric is interested in a continued dialogue with the SAP Community, to hear from end users and improve SAP’s offerings to meet their needs better.

If you’re going to Sapphire in Orlando or Barcelona, you can hear more from Eric in these sessions:

SAP Sapphire Orlando (June 3-5)

  • Unlock Business Agility with Cloud ERP (Session code: ERP169)

  • Supercharge Your Business and Get Innovation Ready with RISE with SAP (Session code: ERP168)

  • The New ERP Mindset (Session code: TRE321)

SAP Sapphire Barcelona (June 11-13)

  • Unlock Business Agility with Cloud ERP (Session code: ERP146)

If you’re planning to join Sapphire virtual, you can hear more in these sessions:

  • ERP126 | SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition: Discover planned innovations

  • ERP127 | SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition: Find out what is next

  • ERP200v | Accelerate business growth with S/4AHANA Cloud Public Edition

And to learn more about the topics discussed in this interview, the following learning journeys are especially recommended:

  • Exploring SAP Cloud ERP learning journey as a starting point to start learning about SAP Cloud ERP, how to distinguish SAP’s cloud ERP solutions and transformation offerings (GROW & RISE), establish a cloud mindset (fit-to-standard, SAP best practices, integration and extensibility, clean core), and get insights into business AI and sustainability fundamentals
  • Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition learning journey teaching fundamental implementation knowledge for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition leading to the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition implementation consultant certification complemented by quarterly live sessions, stay certified content and assessments focusing on AI capabilities and intelligent ERP innovations
  • Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition learning journey teaching implementation fundamentals for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition leading to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition implementation consultant certification, complemented by stay certified content and assessments focusing on how to Manage a Clean Core

Those fundamentals learning journeys are complemented by various line of business specific learning offerings and certifications focusing on business processes, best practices content, and configuration/integration/extensibility options

Do you find any solution for those errors?

entry.title: SAP Collaborative ERP adds Share as Card option to SAP S/4HANA Cloud – Microsoft Teams integration
entry.content:
As AI continues to take over more routine functions for knowledge workers, the remaining tasks often fall to experts or teams of experts. So, collaboration becomes even more important so people can complete tasks in real time, rather than delaying critical decisions because of latency in communication. This SAP S/4HANA integration with Microsoft Teams adds another option to SAP’s collaborative ERP, allowing people to share content as a card, in addition to the share as tab or share as chat functions.

With SAP S/4HANA 2402, we added the ability to share apps as a card, based on the collaborative stage view in Microsoft Teams. This allows the recipient to directly edit the data in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition within the Collaborative Stage View of Microsoft Teams. The value is similar to our other share with Microsoft Teams options – allow people to get more done without task shifting.

One example of how this might work is if one colleague asks another to remove a delivery block on an order. This new capability allows them to collaborate via chat in Microsoft Teams while simultaneously interacting with the relevant data in SAP S/4HANA.

Collaborate using the Collaborative Stage View of Microsoft Teams.

 

To summarize the collaborative ERP capabilities in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition that are generally available, we allow Microsoft Teams users to

  • Share as Chat – include a link to the SAP S/4HANA app in a Microsoft Teams chat
  • Share as Tab – display the SAP S/4HANA app in a tab in Microsoft Teams
  • Share as Card – use the collaborative stage view in Microsoft Teams to show the SAP S/4HANA app and allow users to interact with it

We are planning to add to the Share as Card functionality by providing the ability to share apps as an Adaptive Card-based Loop component. This will allow users to directly view and take action on the data in the Adaptive Card, which can be shared via Microsoft Teams or Microsoft Outlook. If you are an SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition customer and want to test this functionality, please sign up for our early adopter care program.

entry.title: Re: Korean language in SAP MII
entry.content: Hi Senthil, As per SAP PAM, SAP MII 15.1 already end of support from SAP, what is your SAP NW version?

Regards

entry.title: Re: Excel formula to SQL formula for query
entry.content:
If you are looking for a basic SQL query to translate, try this : 

Select D * CEILING((B - C) / D ) AS result FROM your_table;

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Z-tcode creation for CJ8G
entry.content: Why do you need a Z t-code? Have you tried creating a batch job with steps? You could have 50 steps each calling one of the 50 selection variants which equate to each company code.

entry.title: CJI3 submit program issue
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

Im facing a issue while submit the CJI3 transaction in my custom program.

some projects getting ALV data but some projects not found in CJI3 t.code getting this Pop Up message.

I need to suppress this Popup message if projects not found in CJI3 report.

 cl_salv_bs_runtime_info=>set(
    EXPORTING display = abap_false
    metadata = abap_false
    data = abap_true ).

    DATA : it_tabs TYPE TABLE OF abaplist.
    DATA(prof_db) = '000000000001'.
    SET PARAMETER ID 'CAC' FIELD kokrs."'BCCA'.
    SET PARAMETER ID 'PDB' FIELD prof_db."'000000000001'.
 
    SUBMIT rkpep003 WITH SELECTION-TABLE it_rsparams AND RETURN.

    TRY.
        cl_salv_bs_runtime_info=>get_data_ref(
        IMPORTING
        r_data_descr = data_desc ).
      CATCH cx_salv_bs_sc_runtime_info.
    ENDTRY.

What should i do for skip this message in program.

entry.title: Re: Routing with Parameters in SAPUI5 application
entry.content:
@IanYin  The viewLevel is especially relevant for flip and slide transitions. It helps the router to determine the direction of the transition from one page to another. 

Setting the viewLevel to 2 helps the router to determine how to animate the slide transition. Navigation from viewLevel 1 to viewLevel 2 will be animated with a “Slide to Left”” animation. In contrast to that, the back navigation from the viewLevel 2 target to the viewLevel 1 page will be animated with a “Slide to Right” animation, due to the lower viewLevel than the target.

 


@minjie_lao  I hope you're not implementing an app that exposes the parameters values as described in this blog. Exposing values in the URL is the worst security practice. I don't even know why this was still considered and advertised in 2021.

entry.title: Unlocking AI Potential with SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP)
entry.content:
As SAP Sapphire 2024 approaches, we invite you to explore the exciting world of AI within SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP). Whether you are attending in person at Orlando or Barcelona, or joining us virtually, these resources will empower you to infuse AI into your applications and drive innovation

BTP Interactive learning tools: Get guidance with available SAP resources covering aspects like application development, integration, data analytics, and AI

  1. Build Code Test Drive: Experiment without risks 
  1. Code Samples: Generative AI hub starter kit 
  1. Reference architecture: Optimal setup guides 
  1. Step-by-Step Guidance: Detailed implementation instructions on SAP Discovery Center 

Knowledge Building Tools: Collaborate and learn how to use Business AI to implement use cases with certification programs and hands-on developer tutorials

  1. Tutorials: Prompt LLMs in the generative AI hub in SAP AI Core & Launchpad | SAP Tutorials 
  1. Certification Programs: Recognized learning paths for Business AI 
  1. Developer Videos: Hands-on videos on BTP use cases with AI 
  1. Community: Be part of our new public group for AI enthusiasts 

Expert Assistance: Find resources to support your BTP AI journey

  1. SAP Certified Partners: Find SAP Partners 
  1. Tailored SAP Support: SAP Support Portal

entry.title: Re: Custom field added by extending Manage Service Entry...

you should follow that route to extend cds.

entry.title: Re: SAP Mentor Interview with Chief Marketing Officer for Cloud ERP
entry.content: @LeonardoAraujo it is good to hear a candid discussion on such an important topic for customers. Your questions to Eric really get to the heart of what is on folks' minds. Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Z-tcode creation for CJ8G
entry.content: Hi Ken , Actually there is no specific interval to run CJ8G . Business want to run in foreground whenever needed . Supposing with 5 company code , we will create one selection variant . Now we want to assign one Z-tcode to this variant . Whenever user run this Z-tcode , variant should be defaulted . This is the requirement .

entry.title: Re: Can you remove Onboarding business process error mess...
entry.content:
Hi @sshah1 ,

Currently as standard practice there is no such manual option to delete the errors in BPE screen rather only we have restart option.

But if you go BPE GUI and delete the process definition of those errors manually this will remove in the BPE error screen however The Engineering team has advised NOT to delete Process definitions from the BPE: Manage Process definition page. 

Refer this KBA Notes: 
3134782 - [Onboarding] Issue with deleting process definition from BPE GUI

Hope this helps!!

Thanks,

kr,

karthick.
